My Special One

✨ Beautiful Shayari ✨

Mana ki hamara koi sanam nhi,
par fir bhi koi sikhwa koi gam nhi...
Tanha the, tanha hai, tanha hi reh lenge,
badnasib to wo hai jinki kismat me ham nhi. 💫

"Next" dabao aur dekho kya hai tumhare liye... ✨
